_comments.overrides.serialize-javascript: Security patch: forces all transitive dependents to use serialize-javascript >=7.0.5 which fixes CVE-2020-7660 (XSS via prototype pollution). This override should be periodically reviewed and removed once all direct dependencies have updated.
_comments.gsap.license: API-02 audit (2026-06-12): GSAP 3.15.0 uses the GSAP Standard License (https://gsap.com/standard-license) — free for most use cases including commercial. Since GSAP 3.12, all previously Club GSAP plugins (SplitText, DrawSVGPlugin, MorphSVGPlugin, ScrollSmoother, etc.) are included in the standard package at no extra charge. No Club GSAP subscription is required. SplitText is used in src/components/motion/RevealText.tsx — confirmed free under this license. ScrollTrigger was always free. No action required beyond this documentation.
_comments.gsap.plugins-audit: Plugins audited in gsap@3.15.0: ScrollTrigger (free ✓), SplitText (free since 3.12 ✓), DrawSVGPlugin (free since 3.12 ✓), MorphSVGPlugin (free since 3.12 ✓), ScrollSmoother (free since 3.12 ✓), Flip (free ✓), Observer (free ✓). All used plugins are covered under the GSAP Standard License with no purchase required.
